channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: Ben, Lisa, and Colton Have a Party
item.description:
Ben, Lisa, and Colton antagonize Sam Reich for 42 minutes.

Duration: 42:57

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, ben schwartz, lisa gilroy, colton dunn

item.title: Ally, Brennan, and Talia Try to Get Through Lunch
item.description:
Ally, Brennan, and Talia debate the nature of consciousness and out praise each other.

Duration: 37:48

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, ally beardsley, brennan lee mulligan, talia tabin
